method: Price-adjusted base alpha plus AI 2027/current-trend bonus. Positive factors are capped at +10 and then reduced for large-cap consensus and extreme YTD rerating.

factors.compute_factory: AI factory compute concentration, scale-out networking, custom silicon, AI server, accelerator, or data-center interconnect.
factors.power_grid: Power delivery, transformers, grid equipment, electrical balance of plant, firm generation, UPS, or cooling.
factors.packaging_memory_test: HBM, advanced packaging, CPO, optics, photonics, substrates, metrology, inspection, test, or backend tools.
factors.physical_ai: Robotics, humanoid/embodied AI, edge perception, actuation, autonomy, lidar, radar, or machine vision.
factors.security_sovereign: AI security, model-weight protection, cyber, sovereign compute, export-control resilience, or allied redundancy.

sources.title: AI 2027 Compute Forecast
sources.used_for: Compute concentration, AI factory capex, inference-agent power, and H100-equivalent growth assumptions.

sources.title: AI 2027 Summary
sources.used_for: Scenario-level emphasis on automated coding, China compute constraints, model-weight theft, and fast deployment.

sources.title: AI 2027 Security Forecast
sources.used_for: Security, model-weight protection, self-exfiltration, and cyber-capability pressure in frontier AI systems.

sources.title: NVIDIA fiscal 2027 first-quarter results
sources.used_for: Current AI-factory demand, data-center networking growth, optics partnerships, and physical-AI reporting split.

sources.title: Microsoft fiscal 2026 third-quarter earnings call
sources.used_for: Hyperscaler AI capex, capacity constraints, GPU/CPU spend, and agentic computing demand.

sources.title: IEA data-centre electricity update
sources.used_for: Power, transformers, grid interconnection, gas turbines, nuclear/geothermal, and planning bottlenecks.

sources.title: TSMC 2026 monthly revenue
sources.used_for: Current foundry demand backdrop and advanced-node supply-chain validation.
